about.label: About
about.hint: Version info, source code, and support links.

changelog.label: Changelog
changelog.hint: Recent releases and fixes from GitHub.
changelog.noNotes: No release notes were provided for this version.

desktop.chooseTabToAdd: Choose a tab to add to {{layout}}
desktop.createBlankTabInSlot: Create a new blank tab in this slot

blocklist.label: Network blocklist
blocklist.description: Block ads and trackers with EasyList and EasyPrivacy host rules.

native.toast_downloadStarted: Download started, check the system notification
native.httpBlocked_body: This website uses an insecure HTTP connection. To allow loading HTTP websites, enable "Allow HTTP websites" in Settings.

profiles.label: Profiles
profiles.deleteAutoProfileConfirm: Delete the auto profile for {{site}}? This clears its stored browsing data and closes tabs using it.
profiles.deleteAllAutoProfilesConfirm: Delete all {{count}} auto profiles? This clears their stored browsing data and closes tabs using them.
profiles.deleteStaleAutoProfilesConfirm: Delete {{count}} auto profiles not used in the last 14 days? This clears their stored browsing data and closes tabs using them.
profiles.clearDataConfirm: Clear all browsing data for "{{name}}"? This signs you out and closes tabs using this profile.
profiles.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This clears its stored browsing data and closes tabs using this profile.

settings.label: Settings
settings.openExternalLink: Open external link in system browser
settings.videoEdgeLongPressTo2x: Long press on edge to 2x playback
settings.oneProfilePerSiteHint: Use a separate automatic session for each site. Links opened from a site keep that site's profile.
settings.hideHeader: Hide and show toolbar on scroll direction
settings.hideToolbarWhenScrolled: Hide toolbar when page is not at top
settings.mentionNotificationsHint: Due to OS background limits, delivery may be delayed and is not guaranteed.

browsing.descriptionWeb: Network blocking and advanced browsing controls.

profiles.description: Multiple accounts with separate cookies and browsing state.
profiles.injectCookieHint: Paste a Cookie header from another browser to restore a session manually.

search.builtinHint: Turn on the providers you want to show in the new tab search menu.
search.urlHint: Always available for direct URL entry.
search.templateHint: Use `%s` where the query should be inserted.

validation.name: Add a search provider name
validation.template: Use a valid http(s) template URL containing `%s`
validation.duplicateName: A custom search provider with this name already exists

search.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom search?

userStyles.label: User Styles & Scripts
userStyles.hint: Toggle builtin CSS tweaks and add your own host-based styles and scripts.
userStyles.customHint: Customize any website with CSS or JavaScript.
userStyles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom style?

validation.hostGlobs: Add at least one valid host glob

hideXBottomNav.label: Hide X bottom nav bar on scroll

custom.label: Custom Styles
custom.empty: No custom styles yet. Add one to inject your own CSS on matching hosts.

scripts.label: Custom Scripts
scripts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom script?
scripts.empty: No custom scripts yet. Add one to run your own JavaScript on matching hosts.

settings.oneTabPerSite: One tab per site when opening shared link

theme.label: Theme
theme.hint: App and webview theme. If a page does not update immediately, reload the tab.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Choose a language or follow system language.

sync.label: Sync
sync.hint: Bookmarks and settings sync across devices.
sync.upgradeHint: Upgrade to sync bookmarks and settings across devices.
sync.purchaseConfirm: This subscription will be linked to {{email}} and unlock sync anywhere you log into this Nora account.
sync.restoreConflict: This App Store subscription is already linked to {{email}}.
sync.productUnavailable: The App Store product is not available yet.
sync.legalNotice: Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled. By subscribing, you agree to the Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy.

usageLimits.label: Usage limits
usageLimits.description: Set daily time limits for selected services or the whole app.
usageLimits.emptyHint: Add a limit to start tracking daily browsing time.

editor.name: Name
editor.errorMinutes: Set a daily limit of at least 1 minute
editor.errorScope: Select at least one service or apply to the whole app

pin.label: PIN
pin.hint: A PIN is required to manage limits and to unlock when a limit is reached. Resets at local midnight.

lockout.title: Time's up for today
lockout.body: You've used {{used}} of your {{limit}} daily limit for {{name}}.
lockout.noPinHint: Set a PIN in Settings → Usage limits to unlock early.
